2026-04-21T05:48:05.8803191Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-21T05:48:05.8803619Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-21T05:48:05.8803989Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-21T05:48:05.8804298Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-21T05:48:05.8804709Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-21T05:48:05.8804861Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m

2026-04-21T05:48:05.8805691Z [36;1m{[0m

2026-04-21T05:51:58.3640127Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-21T05:51:38.298218963Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"safeoutputs","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"body":"## Documentation Gap\n\n**Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.CostManagement`\n**Service directory:** `sdk/costmanagement/Azure.ResourceManager.CostManagement/`\n**Triggered by:** commit [REDACTED] (PR #57745) by @haiyuazhang\n\n## What Changed\n\nPR #57745 migrated `Azure.ResourceManager.CostManagement` from AutoRest/Swagger to TypeSpec generation. The migration included:\n- Full regeneration of `Generated/` from TypeSpec spec\n- Type renames to follow SDK naming conventions: `GenerateCostDetailsReportRequestDefinition` → `GenerateCostDetailsReportContent`, `GenerateDetailedCostReportDefinition` → `GenerateDetailedCostReportContent`, `CostAllocationRuleDefinition` → (content-equivalent)\n- New model documentation added to `ForecastResult`, `CostManagementDimension`, `QueryResult`, `ExportRun`\n- Bug fixes: null-guard in `ScheduledActionData` nullable struct setters, removed `EditorBrowsable(Never)` from `OperationStatusType.Complete`\n- Custom code cleanup: deleted several manually-maintained files now handled by generator\n\n## Gaps Found\n\n- **CHANGELOG `1.1.0-beta.1` is empty** — the `### Features Added`, `### Breaking Changes`, `### Bugs Fixed`, and `### Other Changes` sections are all blank despite significant API changes in this migration\n- **README has no inline code examples** — the `## Examples` section only links to `https://aka.ms/azuresdk-net-mgmt-samples` without any code snippets showing common operations (creating/listing exports, querying costs, managing budgets)\n- **No `tests/Samples/` directory exists** — there are no test-backed snippet source files for the package, meaning README placeholders cannot be populated by `Update-Snippets.ps1`\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/summary\u003e\n\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\n\n### Step 1: Update CHANGELOG.md\n\n**File:** `sdk/costmanagement/Azure.ResourceManager.CostManagement/CHANGELOG.md`\n**Action:** Edit — fill in the `1.1.0-beta.1 (Unreleased)` section with the actual changes from PR #57745.\n\n```markdown\n## 1.1.0-beta.1 (Unreleased)\n\n### Features Added\n\n- Migrated SDK generation from AutoRest to TypeSpec, enabling richer model documentation and improved alignment with the Azure REST API specification.\n- Added documentation to `ForecastResult`, `CostManagementDimension`, `QueryResult`, and `ExportRun` models.\n\n### Breaking Changes\n\n- Renamed `GenerateCostDetailsReportRequestDefinition` to `GenerateCostDetailsReportContent` to follow Azure SDK naming conventions.\n- Renamed `GenerateDetailedCostReportDefinition` to `GenerateDetailedCostReportContent` to follow Azure SDK naming conventions.\n- Renamed `CostAllocationRuleDefinition` to align with the `*Content` suffix convention used for request body models.\n- Renamed `BenefitUtilizationSummariesListInput` to `BenefitUtilizationSummariesContent`.\n- Renamed `GrainParameter` to `GrainContent`.\n- `ExportRunContent` replaces the prior request body model for triggering export runs.\n\n### Bugs Fixed\n\n- Fixed a null-guard bug in `ScheduledActionData` nullable struct property setters that could cause `NullReferenceException` on certain write paths.\n- Removed incorrect `[EditorBrowsable(EditorBrowsableState.Never)]` attribute from `OperationStatusType.Complete`, making it visible to callers again.\n\n### Other Changes\n\n- Internal code generation files previously maintained by hand (`ExportDataset.cs`, `ExportProperties.cs`, `SettingResource.Serialization.cs`, `ArmCostManagementModelFactory.cs`) are now produced entirely by the TypeSpec generator and have been removed from the Custom folder.\n```\n\n### Step 2: Add sample code and README snippets\n\nCreate a new `tests/Samples/` directory and a sample file. Use `[Test]` (NUnit) on each method. Wrap the visible code with `#region Snippet:\u003cName\u003e` / `#endregion`. Wrap test-only teardown with `#if !SNIPPET` / `#endif`.\n\n**File to create:** `sdk/costmanagement/Azure.ResourceManager.CostManagement/tests/Samples/Sample1_Exports.cs`\n\n```csharp\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\n\nusing System;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\nusing Azure.Identity;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.CostManagement;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.CostManagement.Models;\nusing NUnit.Framework;\n\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.CostManagement.Tests.Samples\n{\n    public class Sample1_Exports\n    {\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only verifying that the sample builds\")]\n        public async Task CreateExport()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:CreateCostManagementExport\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\n\n            // Scope can be a subscription, resource group, management group, or billing account\n            string subscriptionId = \"\u003csubscription-id\u003e\";\n            string scope = $\"/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}\";\n            string exportName = \"myExport\";\n\n            var exportCollection = client.GetCostManagementExports(new Azure.Core.ResourceIdentifier(scope));\n\n            var exportData = new CostManagementExportData\n            {\n                Format = ExportFormatType.Csv,\n                DeliveryInfo = new ExportDeliveryInfo(\n                    new ExportDeliveryDestination(\"\u003cstorage-account-resource-id\u003e\", \"\u003ccontainer\u003e\")\n                    {\n                        RootFolderPath = \"exports\"\n                    }\n                ),\n                Definition = new ExportDefinition(ExportType.ActualCost, ExportTimeframeType.MonthToDate)\n            };\n\n            var lro = await exportCollection.CreateOrUpdateAsync(\n                Azure.WaitUntil.Completed,\n                exportName,\n                exportData);\n\n            CostManagementExportResource export = lro.Value;\n            Console.WriteLine($\"Created export: {export.Id}\");\n            #endregion\n        }\n\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only verifying that the sample builds\")]\n        public async Task GetExport()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:GetCostManagementExport\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\n\n            string subscriptionId = \"\u003csubscription-id\u003e\";\n            string scope = $\"/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}\";\n            string exportName = \"myExport\";\n\n            var exportCollection = client.GetCostManagementExports(new Azure.Core.ResourceIdentifier(scope));\n            CostManagementExportResource export = await exportCollection.GetAsync(exportName);\n            Console.WriteLine($\"Export name: {export.Data.Name}\");\n            Console.WriteLine($\"Export format: {export.Data.Format}\");\n            #endregion\n        }\n\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only verifying that the sample builds\")]\n        public async Task ListExports()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:ListCostManagementExports\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\n\n            string subscriptionId = \"\u003csubscription-id\u003e\";\n            string scope = $\"/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}\";\n\n            var exportCollection = client.GetCostManagementExports(new Azure.Core.ResourceIdentifier(scope));\n            await foreach (CostManagementExportResource export in exportCollection.GetAllAsync())\n            {\n                Console.WriteLine($\"Export: {export.Data.Name}\");\n            }\n            #endregion\n        }\n    }\n}\n```\n\n### Step 3: Update README.md\n\n**File:** `sdk/costmanagement/Azure.ResourceManager.CostManagement/README.md`\n**Action:** Replace the `## Examples` section with the following, which adds snippet placeholders that `Update-Snippets.ps1` will populate:\n\n```markdown\n## Examples\n\nThe following section shows you several code snippets using the `Azure.ResourceManager.CostManagement` library.\n\n### Create a Cost Export\n\n```C# Snippet:CreateCostManagementExport\n```\n```\n\n### Get a Cost Export\n\n```C# Snippet:GetCostManagementExport\n```\n```\n\n### List Cost Exports\n\n```C# Snippet:ListCostManagementExports\n```\n```\n\nFor more code samples, see the [.NET Management Library Code Samples](https://aka.ms/azuresdk-net-mgmt-samples).\n```\n\nAlso ensure the README contains all required sections. The current README uses `## Getting started` but is missing a proper `## Key concepts` section with actual content beyond a generic link. Replace the generic Key concepts section with a summary of the main resource types:\n\n```markdown\n## Key concepts\n\nThe `Azure.ResourceManager.CostManagement` library provides access to cost and billing data through the following main resource types:\n\n- **`CostManagementExportResource`** – Represents a recurring or one-time cost export to a storage account. Use `GetCostManagementExports()` on a scoped resource (subscription, resource group, management group) to manage exports.\n- **`BudgetResource`** – Represents a cost budget with alert thresholds. Use `GetBudgets()` to manage budgets on subscriptions and resource groups.\n- **`CostManagementAlertResource`** – Represents a cost alert. Use `GetCostManagementAlerts()` to retrieve triggered alerts.\n- **`ScheduledActionResource`** – Represents a scheduled action (e.g., scheduled email delivery of a cost view).\n\nAll operations are scoped to an Azure scope (subscription, resource group, management group, or billing account) expressed as an `Azure.Core.ResourceIdentifier`.\n```\n\n### Step 4: Validate\n\nRun these commands in order:\n\n1. `dotnet build sdk/costmanagement/Azure.ResourceManager.CostManagement/`\n2. `dotnet test sdk/costmanagement/Azure.ResourceManager.CostManagement/ --filter TestCategory!=Live`\n3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 costmanagement` — this injects the `#region Snippet:` content from the new sample file into README.md. Check `git diff` afterwards to confirm the README was populated.\n4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 costmanagement` — only needed if any public API changed; this migration already updated the API listing files.\n5. `dotnet format sdk/costmanagement/Azure.ResourceManager.CostManagement/`\n\n\u003c/details\u003e\n\n## Next Steps\n\n\u003e [!TIP]\n\u003e **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **@copilot** to have Copilot coding agent implement the changes described in the Implementation Guide above\n","title":"[CostManagement] Docs: Update CHANGELOG and add README examples after TypeSpec migration"},"name":"create_issue"}}}

2026-04-21T05:51:58.4104249Z server:unified callBackendTool: serverID=safeoutputs, toolName=create_issue, args=map[body:## Documentation Gap
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4104734Z 
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4104881Z **Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.CostManagement`
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4105646Z **Service directory:** `sdk/costmanagement/Azure.ResourceManager.CostManagement/`
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4106307Z **Triggered by:** commit 0a33c643179d4706e73f31cd46b4498b98f6c50d (PR #57745) by @haiyuazhang
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4106674Z 
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4106987Z ## What Changed
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4107181Z 
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4107638Z PR #57745 migrated `Azure.ResourceManager.CostManagement` from AutoRest/Swagger to TypeSpec generation. The migration included:
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4108338Z - Full regeneration of `Generated/` from TypeSpec spec
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4109789Z - Type renames to follow SDK naming conventions: `GenerateCostDetailsReportRequestDefinition` → `GenerateCostDetailsReportContent`, `GenerateDetailedCostReportDefinition` → `GenerateDetailedCostReportContent`, `CostAllocationRuleDefinition` → (content-equivalent)
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4111189Z - New model documentation added to `ForecastResult`, `CostManagementDimension`, `QueryResult`, `ExportRun`
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4112092Z - Bug fixes: null-guard in `ScheduledActionData` nullable struct setters, removed `EditorBrowsable(Never)` from `OperationStatusType.Complete`
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4120782Z - Custom code cleanup: deleted several manually-maintained files now handled by generator
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4121169Z 
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4121246Z ## Gaps Found
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4121363Z 
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4122095Z - **CHANGELOG `1.1.0-beta.1` is empty** — the `### Features Added`, `### Breaking Changes`, `### Bugs Fixed`, and `### Other Changes` sections are all blank despite significant API changes in this migration
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4123642Z - **README has no inline code examples** — the `## Examples` section only links to `https://aka.ms/azuresdk-net-mgmt-samples` without any code snippets showing common operations (creating/listing exports, querying costs, managing budgets)
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4125091Z - **No `tests/Samples/` directory exists** — there are no test-backed snippet source files for the package, meaning README placeholders cannot be populated by `Update-Snippets.ps1`
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4125858Z 
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4125929Z <details>
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4126238Z <summary><strong>📐 Implementation Guide</strong></summary>
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4126470Z 
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4126786Z This section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4127179Z 
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4127273Z ### Step 1: Update CHANGELOG.md
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4127423Z 
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4127650Z **File:** `sdk/costmanagement/Azure.ResourceManager.CostManagement/CHANGELOG.md`
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4128302Z **Action:** Edit — fill in the `1.1.0-beta.1 (Unreleased)` section with the actual changes from PR #57745.
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4128655Z 
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4128729Z ```markdown
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4128906Z ## 1.1.0-beta.1 (Unreleased)
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4129046Z 
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4129119Z ### Features Added
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4129237Z 
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4129896Z - Migrated SDK generation from AutoRest to TypeSpec, enabling richer model documentation and improved alignment with the Azure REST API specification.
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4130746Z - Added documentation to `ForecastResult`, `CostManagementDimension`, `QueryResult`, and `ExportRun` models.
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4131152Z 
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4131225Z ### Breaking Changes
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4131349Z 
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4131770Z - Renamed `GenerateCostDetailsReportRequestDefinition` to `GenerateCostDetailsReportContent` to follow Azure SDK naming conventions.
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4132688Z - Renamed `GenerateDetailedCostReportDefinition` to `GenerateDetailedCostReportContent` to follow Azure SDK naming conventions.
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4133503Z - Renamed `CostAllocationRuleDefinition` to align with the `*Content` suffix convention used for request body models.
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4134192Z - Renamed `BenefitUtilizationSummariesListInput` to `BenefitUtilizationSummariesContent`.
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4134670Z - Renamed `GrainParameter` to `GrainContent`.
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4135091Z - `ExportRunContent` replaces the prior request body model for triggering export runs.
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4135610Z 
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4135686Z ### Bugs Fixed
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4135788Z 
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4136362Z - Fixed a null-guard bug in `ScheduledActionData` nullable struct property setters that could cause `NullReferenceException` on certain write paths.
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4137379Z - Removed incorrect `[EditorBrowsable(EditorBrowsableState.Never)]` attribute from `OperationStatusType.Complete`, making it visible to callers again.
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4137927Z 
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4138002Z ### Other Changes
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4138112Z 
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4138991Z - Internal code generation files previously maintained by hand (`ExportDataset.cs`, `ExportProperties.cs`, `SettingResource.Serialization.cs`, `ArmCostManagementModelFactory.cs`) are now produced entirely by the TypeSpec generator and have been removed from the Custom folder.
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4140010Z ```
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4140098Z 
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4140213Z ### Step 2: Add sample code and README snippets
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4140407Z 
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4141036Z Create a new `tests/Samples/` directory and a sample file. Use `[Test]` (NUnit) on each method. Wrap the visible code with `#region Snippet:<Name>` / `#endregion`. Wrap test-only teardown with `#if !SNIPPET` / `#endif`.
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4141750Z 
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4142080Z **File to create:** `sdk/costmanagement/Azure.ResourceManager.CostManagement/tests/Samples/Sample1_Exports.cs`
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4142491Z 
2026-04-21T05:51:58.4142559Z ```csharp

2026-04-21T05:51:58.4148924Z             string scope = $"/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}";
